entries.title: CSS Specificity Battle Ground Visualizer
entries.notes: Uses DevTools CSSOM API to parse computed styles and render a live specificity scorecard per element. Buildable in 2 weeks. The CSS cascade is poorly visualized in browsers today — no tool shows the actual numeric breakdown in context. Targets developers who maintain design systems.
entries.pain: Developers waste hours debugging CSS specificity conflicts without seeing which rule actually wins.

entries.title: PR Description Changelog Tracker
entries.notes: Polls GitHub API on PR description edits and diffs the markdown. Notifies reviewers when descriptions mutate. Buildable with GitHub GraphQL API in 1 week. Solves the silent scope creep problem with minimal infrastructure.
entries.pain: PR descriptions change after review but nobody notices requirements shifted silently.

entries.title: Outbound Email Sequence Interval Optimizer
entries.notes: Connects to Gmail via API, analyzes reply rates against send timestamps, then surfaces optimal spacing per contact. Freemium with Stripe. Buildable in 3 weeks. Cold email tools don't optimize timing — they just schedule.
entries.pain: Sales reps send follow-ups at random intervals missing the optimal reply windows.

entries.title: Tab Group Intelligence Suggestor
entries.notes: Uses local ML to cluster open tabs by semantic similarity and surface grouping suggestions. Browser-native tab grouping exists but offers no intelligence. Chrome extension API can enumerate tabs and trigger groupings programmatically.
entries.pain: Browser tabs accumulate without organization and users lose track of related content.

entries.title: WebAuthn Device Trust Inventory
entries.notes: Scrapes the browser's credential store via WebAuthn API to list registered authenticators and last-used timestamps. Privacy-focused users want visibility into their passkey footprint. Buildable in 1 week.
entries.pain: Users accumulate passkeys across devices but have no dashboard to audit which ones are still active.

entries.title: Spreadsheet Formula Dependency Explorer
entries.notes: Parses Google Sheets or Excel XML to build a dependency graph and renders it as an interactive tree. Targets teams with complex financial models. Google Sheets API provides formula content access. Buildable in 3 weeks.
entries.pain: Engineers refactoring spreadsheets have no way to see which cells depend on which formulas.

entries.title: Figma Annotation Thread Exporter
entries.notes: Connects to Figma API, extracts comment threads with screenshots, and formats them into Jira/Linear tickets. Buildable in 2 weeks. Design handoff friction is real — developers manually copy-paste feedback constantly.
entries.pain: Design feedback in Figma threads gets lost instead of converting into tracked tickets.

entries.title: Accessibility Color Pair Batch Tester
entries.notes: Scrapes all CSS custom properties from the page, pairs foreground/background combinations, and scores each against WCAG 2.1. Renders a matrix overlay in DevTools. Single-pass page analysis, no backend needed for v1.
entries.pain: Auditing color contrast across a full design system takes manual inspection in each tool.

entries.title: Stripe Webhook Delivery Sequence Replay
entries.notes: Intercepts Stripe webhook deliveries, stores payloads locally, and renders a timeline UI showing retry attempts and response codes. Uses Chrome storage API. Buildable in 1 week. Developers spend hours reconstructing webhook failures from Stripe Dashboard alone.
entries.pain: Debugging Stripe webhook failures requires reconstructing event timelines from logs manually.

entries.title: Terminal Command Session Searcher
entries.notes: Indexes zsh/bash history files locally, provides a popup search UI for fuzzy-matching past commands with timestamps. Privacy-preserving — data stays local. Buildable in 1 week. Shell history search is a known friction point.
entries.pain: Developers can't search shell history across terminal sessions when debugging past commands.

entries.title: Product Launch Countdown Competitor Scanner
entries.notes: Monitors Hacker News, Product Hunt, and press release RSS feeds for keywords matching a competitor list, alerting when launches occur. Configurable alert thresholds. Buildable in 2 weeks with feed parsers.
entries.pain: Product managers miss competitor launches because they don't monitor every relevant source manually.

entries.title: Meeting Scheduling Recovery Analyzer
entries.notes: Integrates with Google Calendar API to detect overlapping events, suggests rescheduling, and logs conflict history for analysis. Targets enterprise users with complex calendars. Buildable in 2 weeks.
entries.pain: Workers double-book or miss meetings because calendar conflicts aren't surfaced proactively.

entries.title: LinkedIn Profile Fit Scorecard
entries.notes: Extracts headline, experience, skills, and activity metrics from LinkedIn profiles, scoring them against a configurable ideal candidate profile. Exports comparison cards. Buildable in 2 weeks via LinkedIn's public profile pages.
entries.pain: Recruiters and sales reps manually assess LinkedIn profiles without standardized comparison criteria.

entries.title: LocalStorage Schema Drift Detector
entries.notes: Monitors localStorage key/value shapes over time, alerts when schemas mutate unexpectedly, and surfaces a diff view. Targets developers maintaining legacy SPAs. Buildable in 1 week with MutationObserver.
entries.pain: Apps silently break when localStorage schema changes across versions without a migration path.

entries.title: API Endpoint Ownership Registry Overlay
entries.notes: Parses OpenAPI specs or network traffic to build an endpoint inventory, then overlays ownership metadata from a config file or Jira. Surfaces owner avatars on API calls. Buildable in 3 weeks.
entries.pain: Teams don't know who owns which API endpoint causing slow response on breaking change decisions.
